text: Dr. Awanti is an incredible listener and a brilliant homeopath. Her holistic approach helped me manage my anxiety and physical symptoms when nothing else worked. Highly recommend!
My teenager was struggling with academic pressure. The counseling sessions here completely changed our family dynamic. We are so grateful for her empathy and guidance.
I attended one of Dr. Awanti's educator workshops. The insights into child psychology and stress management were profound and practical. A truly transformative experience.
Finding a doctor who treats both the mind and body is rare. Dr. Awanti is a gem. Her homeopathic treatments are spot on and her counseling has brought me immense clarity.
Very professional, warm, and welcoming environment. I always feel heard and understood during my consultations. Best holistic clinic in Pune!
